description: World's leading AI chip company with 85-90% market share in AI accelerators. Designs GPUs for gaming, data centers, and AI training. Fabless - uses TSMC for manufacturing. Blackwell and upcoming Rubin architectures.

_externalRelationships.notes: World's first $5T company potential. 2026 revenue ~$500B projected. Rubin chips H2 2026. 71% earnings growth expected. $500B order backlog.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, CNN, Nasdaq
_metadata.notes: Fabless model - TSMC manufactures chips. SK Hynix supplies HBM. AI CapEx +50-60% YoY in 2026, 39% to GPUs. World's 2nd most valuable company.
